invariants: one approval authorizes one exact immutable revision
retries never duplicate an irreversible effect
budget reservation, commit, release, and refund conserve value
distributed rate authority cannot be bypassed per worker or process
accepted-but-unrecorded outcomes become ambiguous and reconcile before retry
success is impossible without an accepted durable receipt
output, receipt, proof, and accounting identify the same revision and effect
every partial state has a convergent resume or repair path
already-achieved desired state is classified explicitly
cross-account, cross-assignment, stale-authority, and stale-entitlement fail closed
repair never erases accepted prior effects or invents completion
ws08_boundary: Only crash repair, fault injection seams, lineage, reconciliation, observability, and documentation groundwork. No live-provider, target-host, pilot, or production claim.
